title: erythrina lanata subsp. lanata
intro: Erythrina lanata subsp. lanata, also known as the Velvet Coral Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the Velvet Coral Tree include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Erythrina lanata subsp. lanata typically include dried bark, leaves, or roots that can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
